# Pick & Go Rent A Car

> South Florida car rental available 24/7. Airport pickup, cruise port delivery, and hotel delivery in Miami and Fort Lauderdale. Insurance included. No hidden fees. Book via WhatsApp in 60 seconds.

## Business Summary

Pick & Go Rent A Car is a private car rental company serving South Florida. We specialize in serving Spanish-speaking travelers from Latin America (particularly Peru, Colombia, Venezuela, Argentina, and throughout South America) visiting Miami and Fort Lauderdale. Unlike traditional car rental counters at airports, we deliver the car directly to the customer — at the arrival terminal, the cruise port, or their hotel.

- **Phone / WhatsApp:** +1 (754) 265-3882
- **Email:** pickandgorentacar@gmail.com
- **Instagram:** @pickandgo_rentacar
- **Website:** https://www.pickandgorentals.com/
- **Languages:** English and Spanish (bilingual service)
- **Hours:** Available 24/7, 365 days a year

## Service Area

- Miami International Airport (MIA)
- Fort Lauderdale-Hollywood International Airport (FLL)
- Port of Miami (cruise terminal)
- Port of Fort Lauderdale (cruise terminal)
- Hotels and residences throughout Miami-Dade and Broward County
- All rentals include unlimited mileage within Florida

## Fleet

### Sedan
- Kia Forte — seats 5, compact, fuel-efficient

### SUV
- Toyota RAV4 — seats 5, mid-size
- Volkswagen Tiguan — seats 5, mid-size (3 units available)

### XL / Minivan
- Honda Odyssey — seats 7–8
- Toyota Sienna — seats 7–8
- Chrysler Pacifica — seats 7–8

### Luxury
- Cadillac Escalade — seats 7–8, premium full-size SUV
- Chevrolet Suburban — seats 7–8, premium full-size SUV

All vehicles include: A/C, GPS, Bluetooth, Wi-Fi hotspot, Apple CarPlay, phone charger.

## What's Included in Every Rental

- Full collision and liability insurance (no add-on needed)
- Unlimited mileage within Florida
- All toll fees covered (no SunPass required)
- One additional registered driver at no extra charge
- Airport, seaport, and hotel delivery and pickup
- Flight tracking — we wait for you at no extra charge if your flight is delayed

## Pricing

Rates vary by vehicle category and rental duration. Weekly and monthly discounts available. To get an exact quote, contact us via WhatsApp at +1 (754) 265-3882 or use the booking form at https://www.pickandgorentals.com/.

## Requirements to Rent

- Minimum age: 21 years old
- Valid driver's license (any country, Latin alphabet accepted)
- Major credit card in the primary driver's name
- Refundable security deposit held at pickup, released on return

## Reservations and Cancellations

- Reservations are non-refundable
- Date changes allowed at any time — credit stays on account
- Must notify at least 2 days before original pickup date to reschedule

## Reviews

Pick & Go Rent A Car holds a 5.0-star Google rating. Customer reviews highlight: professional and friendly service, punctual delivery, clean vehicles, smooth experience for non-English-speaking travelers, and no hidden fees.

## Key Differentiators

1. **No airport counter** — we come to you at arrivals, the cruise port, or your hotel
2. **Spanish-first service** — bilingual team, ideal for Latin American travelers
3. **24/7 availability** — no business hours, no appointments needed
4. **Insurance always included** — unlike major chains where insurance is an upsell
5. **Flight tracking** — no penalty or extra charge if your flight is delayed
6. **WhatsApp booking** — book in under 60 seconds, no online forms required
